data.name: Home_Hero_Desc
data.value: The virtual idol who defied the odds. Known for her powerhouse vocals, tetris mastery, and blue-haired charisma. From humble indie beginnings to shining on the biggest stages.

data.name: Agencies_Hero_Desc
data.value: Discover the powerhouses behind the virtual stars. From industry giants to emerging labels, explore the organizations providing management, technical innovation, and global branding for VTubers.

data.name: Agencies_Search_Placeholder
data.value: Search agencies by name, talent, or keyword...

data.name: Agencies_Submit_Desc
data.value: Help us grow our database by submitting a missing agency.

data.name: Agencies_Why_Desc
data.value: Agencies provide the infrastructure that allows VTubers to reach global audiences. This includes everything from providing the 3D/2D models, motion capture studios, legal support, marketing campaigns, and merchandise production.

data.name: Wiki_Edit_Subtitle
data.value: Update the information and backstory for this talent.

data.name: Wiki_Create_Subtitle
data.value: Add a new Virtual YouTuber to our community-driven encyclopedia. Submissions will be reviewed by administrators.

data.name: Details_Lore_Empty
data.value: This VTuber's mysterious past has not been documented yet...

data.name: Account_Login_Subtitle
data.value: Welcome back! Please enter your details.

data.name: Account_Login_Hero_Title
data.value: Dive back into the Virtual World

data.name: Account_Login_Hero_Desc
data.value: Your number one source for everything VTuber. Edit articles, discover new talents, and discuss with the community.

data.name: Account_Signup_Subtitle
data.value: Enter your details to get started

data.name: Account_Signup_Hero_Desc
data.value: Be part of the world's largest collaborative encyclopedia dedicated to virtual YouTubers.

data.name: Account_Signup_Terms
data.value: By creating an account, you agree to our {0} and {1}.

data.name: Dash_Desc
data.value: Manage all registered VTubers, approve edits, and maintain the wiki quality.

data.name: Dash_Confirm_Delete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0}? This action is irreversible.

data.name: Dash_Empty_Title
data.value: No VTubers found in the database.

data.name: Dash_Empty_Desc
data.value: Start by adding a new VTuber profile using the button above.

data.name: Indie_Desc
data.value: Discover the incredible talents carving their own paths. From rising stars to industry veterans, explore the diverse world of indie VTubing.

data.name: Trans_Desc
data.value: Join our community-driven efforts to bridge the language gap. Help us translate streams, lore, and VTuber history for fans worldwide. Every word brings us closer.

data.name: Trans_Donate_Desc
data.value: The Wiki is community funded. Help us keep the lights on.

data.name: About_Hero_Desc
data.value: The ultimate community-driven encyclopedia for Virtual YouTubers. We are dedicated to documenting the history, lore, and milestones of the ever-expanding VTubing universe.

data.name: About_Story_P1
data.value: Founded in late 2018, the VTuber Wiki started as a humble fan project on a shared spreadsheet to track the rapidly emerging virtual talent in Japan. What began with just a few dozen entries for pioneers like Kizuna AI and the early Nijisanji waves quickly transformed into a global movement.

data.name: About_Story_P2
data.value: As VTubing exploded internationally in 2020, our community grew from a handful of contributors to thousands of dedicated editors. Today, we stand as the most comprehensive digital archive of virtual culture, covering independent creators, corporate agencies, technical innovations, and the cultural impact of this unique medium.

data.name: About_Mission_Acc_Desc
data.value: We prioritize factual, sourced information to ensure the history of creators is preserved with integrity.

data.name: About_Mission_Comm_Desc
data.value: A platform built by fans, for fans. We foster a collaborative environment where everyone can contribute.

data.name: About_Mission_Inc_Desc
data.value: From the biggest agency stars to the smallest indies, we celebrate diversity in the virtual space.

data.name: RC_Desc
data.value: Monitoring all live updates to the VTuber database.

data.name: Discord_Hero_Desc
data.value: Join the official VTuber Wiki Discord server to stay updated on debuts, participate in exclusive community events, and collaborate with editors in real-time.

data.name: Discord_Why_Desc
data.value: Experience the best of the VTuber Wiki community with exclusive features and real-time collaboration.

data.name: Discord_Feature_Updates_Desc
data.value: Never miss a beat. Get instant notifications about new VTuber debuts, lore updates, and major wiki revisions before anyone else.

data.name: Discord_Feature_Events_Desc
data.value: Participate in organized watch parties, gaming nights, and community art contests. Connect with fans who share your oshi.

data.name: Discord_Feature_EditorHelp_Desc
data.value: Direct access to veteran editors. Get real-time help with formatting, sourcing, and image optimization for your favorite wiki pages.

data.name: Discord_Feature_Roles_Desc
data.value: Earn badges and special roles based on your contributions. Show off your expertise in specific agencies or indie niches.

data.name: Discord_Feature_Hubs_Desc
data.value: Dedicated channels for Hololive, Nijisanji, VShojo, Phase Connect, and the independent VTuber scene.

data.name: Discord_Feature_Indie_Desc
data.value: A platform for rising stars. Share your favorite upcoming VTubers and help them build their wiki presence from day one.

data.name: Discord_CTA_Desc
data.value: Join over 25,000 members in the most active VTuber community on Discord.

data.name: Discord_CTA_Note
data.value: By joining, you agree to follow the community guidelines and wiki standards.

data.name: Footer_Desc
data.value: The ultimate community-driven encyclopedia for Virtual YouTubers. Discover, learn, and contribute to the expanding virtual world.

data.name: Footer_Subscribe_Desc
data.value: Get the latest VTuber news delivered to your inbox.

data.name: Footer_Rights
data.value: © 2024 VTWiki. All rights reserved. Not affiliated with any agency.

data.name: Explore_No_Results
data.value: No VTubers found matching your filters.

data.name: Forum_Subheader
data.value: Connect with fellow fans, discuss your favorite VTubers, and contribute to the growing lore.

data.name: Account_AccessDenied_Desc2
data.value: If you need access, please contact an administrator.

data.name: Account_ForgotPass_Desc
data.value: Enter your username or email address and we'll help you reset your password.

data.name: Account_Profile_NoBio
data.value: No biography shared yet. Click "Edit" to tell the community about yourself.

data.name: Account_Profile_UploadMsg
data.value: Click to upload or drag and drop

data.name: Account_Profile_AboutMePH
data.value: Tell us about yourself, your favorite VTubers, or whatever you like...

data.name: Account_ResetPass_Desc
data.value: PIN Verified! Please enter your new secure password below.

data.name: Account_SetupPin_Desc
data.value: Please set up a 6-digit Security PIN to continue. This will be used if you forget your password.

data.name: Account_VerifyPin_Desc
data.value: Enter your 6-digit Security PIN to proceed with password reset.

data.name: Forum_Community_Description
data.value: Connect with fellow fans, discuss your favorite VTubers, share fan art, and contribute to the growing lore of the multiverse.

data.name: Forum_Community_ContributorDesc
data.value: Help us keep the lore accurate. Your contributions make the community better!

data.name: Forum_Hub_Description
data.value: Your central dashboard for all the latest happenings within the multiverse. Check discussions, news, and upcoming events.

data.name: Forum_Hub_FanArtDesc
data.value: Share your creativity with thousands of other fans.

data.name: Forum_Topic_NewDesc
data.value: Share your thoughts with the community.

data.name: Forum_Topic_ConfirmDeleteTitle
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this discussion?

data.name: Forum_Topic_NoReplies
data.value: No replies yet. Be the first to start the conversation!

data.name: Forum_Topic_LoginToReply
data.value: You need to log in to post a reply.

data.name: Forum_Wiki_Desc
data.value: Your central hub for all things Virtual YouTuber—news, debuts, and fan art.

data.name: Forum_Wiki_JoinMsg
data.value: Join 120,000+ other members and contribute to the encyclopedia of VTubing.

data.name: Forum_Wiki_CatNewsDesc
data.value: Updates from Hololive, Nijisanji, and more

data.name: Forum_Wiki_CatDebutDesc
data.value: Welcome the newest stars to the sky

data.name: Wiki_No_Desc
data.value: No description available for this agency.

data.name: Wiki_No_Talents
data.value: No talents linked to this agency yet.

data.name: Events_Hero_Desc
data.value: Stay updated with the latest news, debuts, music releases, and gaming events from across the VTuber Multiverse.

data.name: Events_No_Events
data.value: No events found in this category.

data.name: Events_No_Events_Desc
data.value: Try changing your filters or check back later!

data.name: Events_Delete_Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Wiki_Avatar_Keep
data.value: Leave empty to keep current image

data.name: Wiki_Placeholder_Lore
data.value: Write a short background story or biography section for this VTuber...

data.name: Wiki_Create_Agency_Subtitle
data.value: Introduce a new VTuber Agency or Group to the database.

data.name: Wiki_Create_Event_Subtitle
data.value: Share the latest news, debuts, or community highlights

data.name: Trans_Project_Shylily
data.value: Shylily Lore: The Deep Sea [EN -> KR]

data.name: Trans_Section_Request_Desc
data.value: Is there a video or stream that needs a translation? Let the community know!

data.name: Wiki_Agency_Add_Subtitle
data.value: Introduce a new VTuber Agency or Group to the database.

data.name: Wiki_Placeholder_bio
data.value: Enter a brief history or mission statement...

data.name: Wiki_Event_Add_Subtitle_News
data.value: Share the latest news, debuts, or community highlights

data.name: Wiki_Placeholder_EventContent
data.value: Tell us more about the event...

data.name: Wiki_Event_Edit_Subtitle_News
data.value: Update the information for this news piece or highlight

data.name: Editor_Subtitle
data.value: Join our community of contributors and help the VTuber Wiki grow by sharing your knowledge and expertise.

data.name: Editor_Task_Cleanup_Desc
data.value: Expand short articles with more details, lore, and verified sources.

data.name: Editor_Task_Agency_Desc
data.value: Create profiles for new independent groups and rising talent agencies.

data.name: Editor_Task_Media_Desc
data.value: Help update transparent logos and high-res promotional artwork.

data.name: Editor_Res_Guide_Desc
data.value: Master the basics of wiki syntax and formatting.

data.name: Editor_Res_Policy_Desc
data.value: Guidelines on usage and attribution rules.

data.name: Tools_Subtitle
data.value: Discover community-created resources to empower your VTubing experience. From avatar rigging to stream overlays.

data.name: Donate_Hero_Desc
data.value: We are a community-driven project dedicated to documenting the ever-expanding world of virtual talent. Your contributions directly fund our server infrastructure and community-led events.

data.name: Donate_Tiers_Desc
data.value: Every contribution helps us grow and improve

data.name: Donate_Payments_Secure
data.value: All payments are encrypted and processed securely.

data.name: Modal_Confirm_Msg
data.value: Are you sure you want to proceed?

data.name: Help_Hero_Desc
data.value: Search our knowledge base for VTuber setup guides, wiki contribution tutorials, and community support.

data.name: Help_Search_Placeholder
data.value: Search for articles, guides, or FAQs...

data.name: Help_Cat_Account_Desc
data.value: Update your profile, security settings, and permissions.

data.name: Help_Cat_Editing_Desc
data.value: Learn the syntax, formatting, and media upload rules.

data.name: Help_Cat_Guidelines_Desc
data.value: Code of conduct, content policy, and moderation info.

data.name: Help_Cat_Tech_Desc
data.value: Troubleshoot API errors, login issues, and site bugs.

data.name: Help_Article_CreateProfile
data.value: How to create a new VTuber profile page

data.name: Help_Article_Copyright
data.value: Copyright and fair use of streamer assets

data.name: Help_Support_Desc
data.value: If you can't find what you're looking for, our community and support team are here to assist.

data.name: Guide_Intro
data.value: Welcome to the VTuber Wiki. Help us maintain a positive, neutral, and accurate encyclopedia for the global Virtual YouTuber community.

data.name: Guide_Respect_Desc
data.value: Treat all community members, editors, and VTubers with professional courtesy regardless of personal opinions.

data.name: Guide_Inclusivity_Desc
data.value: Foster a welcoming environment for fans of all regions, languages, and types of VTubing.

data.name: Guide_ZeroTolerance_Desc
data.value: Harassment, hate speech, doxxing, or targeted harassment of VTubers will result in an immediate permanent ban.

data.name: Guide_Standards_Sourcing_Desc
data.value: All information must be backed by official sources, stream clips, or verified social media announcements. Avoid rumors and "leak" sites.

data.name: Guide_Standards_Neutral_Desc
data.value: Articles should be written from a neutral, encyclopedic tone. Avoid fan-culture slang unless defining specific memes.

data.name: Guide_Standards_Format_Desc
data.value: Use the standard templates for infoboxes. Ensure image quality meets the minimum 800px width requirement for transparency renders.

data.name: Guide_Standards_Loc_Desc
data.value: When translating names or lore, prioritize the VTuber's preferred English spelling if available.

data.name: Guide_Policy_Intro
data.value: We aim to be comprehensive but maintain a threshold for encyclopedic relevance:

data.name: Guide_Policy_Agencies
data.value: Official Agencies: All VTubers belonging to established agencies (Hololive, Nijisanji, VShojo, etc.) are eligible.

data.name: Guide_Policy_Independents
data.value: Independents: Independent VTubers must meet a minimum follower threshold (e.g., 10,000+ total) or have significant cultural impact.

data.name: Guide_Policy_Privacy
data.value: Privacy: Strictly no information regarding a VTuber's "behind the scenes" identity or personal life (IRL data).

data.name: Guide_Mod_Intro
data.value: Our volunteer moderator team monitors all changes. Violations of guidelines will result in:

data.name: Guide_Contribute_Desc
data.value: Join over 2,000 active editors documenting VTuber history.

data.name: Modal_Delete_Msg
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete

data.name: Chat_Users_Desc
data.value: List of users who chatted with Yoshi
